title: Breadcrumb
description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the breadcrumb component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the button component code.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: import Link from "next/link"; import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbEllipsis, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, } from "@shery-ui/components"; import { Button } from "@shery-ui/components"; import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger, } from "@shery-ui/components"; export default function BreadcrumbDemo() { return ( Home Documentation Themes GitHub Components Breadcrumb ); }

examples.title: Custom seperator
examples.description: Use a custom component as children for <BreadcrumbSeparator /> to create a custom separator.
examples.code:
import Link from "next/link";
import { DotIcon } from "lucide-react";

import {
  Breadcrumb,
  BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink,
  BreadcrumbList,
  BreadcrumbPage,
  BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from "@/components/ui/breadcrumb";

export function BreadcrumbSeparatorDemo() {
  return (
    <Breadcrumb>
      <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/">Home</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
          <DotIcon />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/components">Components</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
          <DotIcon />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbPage>Breadcrumb</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
      </BreadcrumbList>
    </Breadcrumb>
  );
}

examples.title: Dropdown
examples.description: You can compose <BreadcrumbItem /> with a <DropdownMenu /> to create a dropdown in the breadcrumb.
examples.code:
import Link from "next/link";
import { ChevronDownIcon, DotIcon } from "lucide-react";

import {
  Breadcrumb,
  BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink,
  BreadcrumbList,
  BreadcrumbPage,
  BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from "@shery-ui/components";
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuGroup,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@shery-ui/components";

export default function BreadcrumbDropdown() {
  return (
    <Breadcrumb>
      <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/">Home</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
          <DotIcon />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <DropdownMenu>
            <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
              <button className="flex items-center gap-1">
                Components
                <ChevronDownIcon className="size-3.5" />
              </button>
            </DropdownMenuTrigger>
            <DropdownMenuContent align="start">
              <DropdownMenuGroup>
                <DropdownMenuItem>Documentation</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem>Themes</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem>GitHub</DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuGroup>
            </DropdownMenuContent>
          </DropdownMenu>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
          <DotIcon />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbPage>Breadcrumb</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
      </BreadcrumbList>
    </Breadcrumb>
  );
}

examples.title: Collapsible
examples.description: We provide a <BreadcrumbEllipsis /> component to show a collapsed state when the breadcrumb is too long.
examples.code:
import Link from "next/link";

import {
  Breadcrumb,
  BreadcrumbEllipsis,
  BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink,
  BreadcrumbList,
  BreadcrumbPage,
  BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from "@shery-ui/components";

export default function BreadcrumbCollapsible() {
  return (
    <Breadcrumb>
      <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/">Home</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbEllipsis />
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/docs/components">Components</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbPage>Breadcrumb</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
      </BreadcrumbList>
    </Breadcrumb>
  );
}

examples.title: Link component
examples.description: To use a custom link component from your routing library, you can use the asChild prop on <BreadcrumbLink />.
examples.code:
import Link from "next/link";

import {
  Breadcrumb,
  BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink,
  BreadcrumbList,
  BreadcrumbPage,
  BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from "@shery-ui/components";

export function BreadcrumbLinkDemo() {
  return (
    <Breadcrumb>
      <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/">Home</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink asChild>
            <Link href="/components">Components</Link>
          </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbPage>Breadcrumb</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
      </BreadcrumbList>
    </Breadcrumb>
  );
}
